upasargachandrika.example_text: 'suvarRaM KAditvA'pagirati' (E0 A0 324) apagirati udgirati vamati
'na saKyamindro'sunvatA saNgfRIta' (f॰4.25.7) anupagacCatItyAha
'yadadAsyannA uta saNgfRAmi (aTarva॰6.119.1) saNgfRAmi=pratijAne dAsyAmIti

'yadannamadmyanftena devA dAsyannadAsyannuta saNgfRAmi' (aTarva॰6.71.3) ukto'rTaH saNgfRAmi nigirAmIti saMskftaSArmaRyakozakArO ayaM ca tayormahitayorviBramaH sampUrvo gfRAtiH pratiSAne rUQaH rUQiM ca pratyanAdaro na yuktaH sAyaRo'pyatrEva sUkte smAha- sampUrvo guRAtiH pratijYAyAM vartata iti
'nityaM SabdaM saNgirate' (pA॰1.3.52 sUtravfttO) pratijAnIta ityAha
'vasUni deSAMSca nivartayizyan rAmaM nfpaH saNgiramARa eva tayA'vajajYe…' (Bawwi॰3.8).. ukto'rTaH
'yaTAsvaM saNgirante sma goptIzu svAmino guRAn' (Bawwi॰8.31) aByupagacCanti=sammanasaH santo vadantIti tAtparyam

'mandAkrAntA…tAM saNgirante' (Sruta॰).. Ekamatyena vyapadiSantItyAha atra pratijYAne'rTe giratestOdAdikasya prayogo vyavahAraBraMSakfta ityasmABirvyAkaraRacandrodaye tiNantaprakaraRe sapramARamupapAditamiti tata evAvasAtavyam
'yadgigAmi saNgirAmi samudra iva saNgiraH' (aTarva॰6.135.3) saNgirAmi=samyaggirAmi=nigirAmi

'saKA saKyurna praminAti saNgiraH' (aTarva॰18.4.60) saKA (somaH) aBizavastotrAdinA saKiBUtasya yazwuH saNgiraH saNgIryamARAni idameva PalaM somAdeva laBeyetyevaM pratijYAyamAnAni kAmyamAnAni vastUni (sAyaRaH)
'dakziRAnAM ca saNgare Gnan DarmeRa na duzyati' (manu0 8349) saNgaro'varoDa iti meDAtiTiH dakziRADanagavAdyapahAranimitte saMgare saMgrAme iti kullUkaH
'evAnevAva sAgarat' (aTarva0 1674) ko romanTo nAma
'udgIrRasya vA avagIrRasya vA manTo romanTaH' (3115 sUtraBAzye) avagIrRamapAdAnapradeSAnniHsftaM romanTAKyaM dravyaM vartayati (kASikA)
'avagirate grAsam' (pA0 1351 sUtra vfttiH) nigiratItyarTaH
'avagiramARESca piSAcErmAMsaSoRitam' (Bawwi0 830) avagiramAREH=nigiladBiH
'hftApi te haM na jarAM gamizye AjyaM yaTA makzikayA'vagIrRam' (rA0 34748) avagIrRaM nigIrRam aByavahftam
'yA gozWI lokavidvizwA yA ca svEravisarpiRI parahiMsAtmikA yA ca na tAmavagired buDaH' (amaru0 77 ityatrArjunavarmadevakftAyAM wIkAyAm) nAvagiret nAsvAdeta

'udgIrRasya vAvagIrRasya vA manTo romanTaH' (pA0 3115 sUtraBAzye) udgIrRam udvAntam udgalitam

'pralapanniva sonmAdamujjagAra manogatam' (kaTA0 8965) ujjagAra vivavAra
